list.label: Client
list.query: ethrex : ethrex-mainnet-2, reth : reth-mainnet-1, nethermind : nethermind-mainnet-1, geth : geth-mainnet-1

panels.title: What we run & how we measure  (click to expand)

options.content:
### What we run

Each execution client runs its own upstream default. We refresh every client every 2 hours from its main development line and restart it in place, so these numbers track current code. Current versions are in the table below.

| Client | Source (refreshed every 2h) | Sync mode |
|---|---|---|
| ethrex | binary from `ghcr.io/lambdaclass/ethrex:main` | snap |
| reth | binary from `ghcr.io/paradigmxyz/reth:nightly` | full |
| nethermind | built from `NethermindEth/nethermind` `master` | snap, non-validator |
| geth | binary from `ethereum/client-go:latest` | snap |

Launch commands (perf-relevant flags verbatim; `<jwt>` and the metrics bind are infra):

```bash
# reth
reth node --full --chain mainnet \
  --authrpc.jwtsecret <jwt> --authrpc.port 8551 \
  --http --http.api eth,web3,net,debug,trace,txpool \
  --db.read-transaction-timeout 0 --rpc.eth-proof-window 100000 \
  --metrics :6060

# geth
geth --mainnet --syncmode snap \
  --authrpc.jwtsecret <jwt> --authrpc.port 8551 \
  --http --http.api eth,web3,net,debug,txpool \
  --history.chain postprague \
  --metrics --metrics.port 6060

# nethermind
nethermind --config mainnet \
  --Sync.SnapSync true --Sync.NonValidatorNode true \
  --Sync.DownloadBodiesInFastSync false --Sync.DownloadReceiptsInFastSync false \
  --Init.MemoryHint 4294967296 --FlatDb.Enabled true \
  --JsonRpc.JwtSecretFile <jwt> --JsonRpc.EnginePort 8551 \
  --Metrics.Enabled --Metrics.ExposePort 6060

# ethrex
ethrex --network mainnet --syncmode snap \
  --authrpc.jwtsecret <jwt> --authrpc.port 8551 \
  --http.addr 0.0.0.0 --http.port 8545 \
  --metrics --metrics.port 3701
```

One Lighthouse build sits in front of every client, with the same flags and checkpoint-sync:

```bash
lighthouse bn --network mainnet \
  --execution-endpoint http://localhost:8551 --execution-jwt <jwt> \
  --checkpoint-sync-url https://mainnet-checkpoint-sync.attestant.io \
  --metrics --metrics-port 5054
```

### How block time is measured

Lighthouse times the top row, the fair comparison, so no client measures itself. It records the wall-clock each block takes to validate through `engine_newPayload` (`execution_layer_request_times{method="new_payload"}`). One observer and one code path front all four clients, so you can compare p50/p99 directly, geth included.

The native per-block panels come from each client's own metric. Use them for per-client trends, not to rank clients against each other, because their scopes differ:

- ethrex: `gigagas`, `gas_used/(gigagas·1e9)` (exec + merkle + store)
- reth: `..._new_payload_gas_per_second_last`, `..._new_payload_last` (excludes async DB persistence)
- nethermind: `mgas_per_sec`, `last_block_processing_time_in_ms` (branch exec + state root)
- geth: `chain_mgasps`, `chain_inserts` at `quantile="0.5"` (full ProcessBlock, resetting timer, sparse)

The x-axis is ethrex head `block_number`. All four follow the same chain at the same head.

### Environment

Held constant: mainnet, one Lighthouse build with its checkpoint-sync and JWT, and matched hardware (Xeon E-2386G, 62.7 GiB, 2x NVMe). Prometheus scrapes every 5s.

Host CPU and RAM come from `node_exporter`. Per-process CPU, RSS, threads, and FDs come from `process-exporter`, running on all four nodes and measuring geth the same way as the rest. Read RSS as a trend: Go and .NET return freed memory to the OS lazily, and Rust with jemalloc holds onto arena pages, so steady-state RSS reflects the runtime as much as the client.

### Fair-panel details

The timeseries use a 10-minute sliding window. The range bargauges aggregate over the selected time range. newPayload fires about once per slot (~12s), so a short window snaps the quantile to a single Lighthouse bucket edge, which is where the 50/100/200 ms look-alike readings come from.

Lighthouse buckets are coarse (10/20/50/100/200/500 ms), so p99 resolution is bucket-limited. A 151 ms reading is interpolation inside the 100 to 200 ms bucket. Nimbus buckets (5/10/25/50/100/250 ms) would sharpen the tail if we need it.

The Client filter at top-left applies to every panel. When a client lacks a given metric, that panel skips it.

panels.title: Fair Block Processing — engine_newPayload (uniform Lighthouse observer)
Execution win-rate — share of range with fastest newPayload (fair, Lighthouse)
Block complexity vs duration — gas used (X) vs FAIR newPayload time (Y, ms)
Per-Block Throughput & Latency (NATIVE per-client metrics — scope differs, NOT the fair reference above)

targets.expr: sum by (instance)(gas_used{job=~"ethrex L1", instance=~"ethrex-mainnet-2(:\\d+)?$", instance=~"($node):.*"}) / on(instance) (sum by (instance)(gigagas{job=~"ethrex L1", instance=~"ethrex-mainnet-2(:\\d+)?$", instance=~"($node):.*"}) * 1000000000)

sort_desc(
label_replace(avg_over_time(gigagas{job=~"ethrex L1", instance=~"ethrex-mainnet-2(:\\d+)?$", instance=~"($node):.*"}[$__range]), "client", "$1", "instance", "([a-z]+)-mainnet.*")
or label_replace(avg_over_time(reth_consensus_engine_beacon_new_payload_gas_per_second_last{instance=~"reth-mainnet-1:.*", instance=~"($node):.*"}[$__range]) / 1e9, "client", "$1", "instance", "([a-z]+)-mainnet.*")
or label_replace(max by (instance)(avg_over_time(nethermind_mgas_per_sec{instance=~"nethermind-mainnet-1:.*", instance=~"($node):.*"}[$__range])) / 1000, "client", "$1", "instance", "([a-z]+)-mainnet.*")
or label_replace(avg_over_time(chain_mgasps{instance=~"geth-mainnet-1:.*", instance=~"($node):.*", quantile="0.5"}[$__range]) / 1000, "client", "$1", "instance", "([a-z]+)-mainnet.*")
)

sort_desc(
label_replace(quantile_over_time(0.50, gigagas{job=~"ethrex L1", instance=~"ethrex-mainnet-2(:\\d+)?$", instance=~"($node):.*"}[$__range]), "client", "$1", "instance", "([a-z]+)-mainnet.*")
or label_replace(quantile_over_time(0.50, reth_consensus_engine_beacon_new_payload_gas_per_second_last{instance=~"reth-mainnet-1:.*", instance=~"($node):.*"}[$__range]) / 1e9, "client", "$1", "instance", "([a-z]+)-mainnet.*")
or label_replace(max by (instance)(quantile_over_time(0.50, nethermind_mgas_per_sec{instance=~"nethermind-mainnet-1:.*", instance=~"($node):.*"}[$__range])) / 1000, "client", "$1", "instance", "([a-z]+)-mainnet.*")
or label_replace(quantile_over_time(0.50, chain_mgasps{instance=~"geth-mainnet-1:.*", instance=~"($node):.*", quantile="0.5"}[$__range]) / 1000, "client", "$1", "instance", "([a-z]+)-mainnet.*")
)

sort_desc(
label_replace(quantile_over_time(0.95, gigagas{job=~"ethrex L1", instance=~"ethrex-mainnet-2(:\\d+)?$", instance=~"($node):.*"}[$__range]), "client", "$1", "instance", "([a-z]+)-mainnet.*")
or label_replace(quantile_over_time(0.95, reth_consensus_engine_beacon_new_payload_gas_per_second_last{instance=~"reth-mainnet-1:.*", instance=~"($node):.*"}[$__range]) / 1e9, "client", "$1", "instance", "([a-z]+)-mainnet.*")
or label_replace(max by (instance)(quantile_over_time(0.95, nethermind_mgas_per_sec{instance=~"nethermind-mainnet-1:.*", instance=~"($node):.*"}[$__range])) / 1000, "client", "$1", "instance", "([a-z]+)-mainnet.*")
or label_replace(quantile_over_time(0.95, chain_mgasps{instance=~"geth-mainnet-1:.*", instance=~"($node):.*", quantile="0.5"}[$__range]) / 1000, "client", "$1", "instance", "([a-z]+)-mainnet.*")
)

sort_desc(
label_replace(quantile_over_time(0.99, gigagas{job=~"ethrex L1", instance=~"ethrex-mainnet-2(:\\d+)?$", instance=~"($node):.*"}[$__range]), "client", "$1", "instance", "([a-z]+)-mainnet.*")
or label_replace(quantile_over_time(0.99, reth_consensus_engine_beacon_new_payload_gas_per_second_last{instance=~"reth-mainnet-1:.*", instance=~"($node):.*"}[$__range]) / 1e9, "client", "$1", "instance", "([a-z]+)-mainnet.*")
or label_replace(max by (instance)(quantile_over_time(0.99, nethermind_mgas_per_sec{instance=~"nethermind-mainnet-1:.*", instance=~"($node):.*"}[$__range])) / 1000, "client", "$1", "instance", "([a-z]+)-mainnet.*")
or label_replace(quantile_over_time(0.99, chain_mgasps{instance=~"geth-mainnet-1:.*", instance=~"($node):.*", quantile="0.5"}[$__range]) / 1000, "client", "$1", "instance", "([a-z]+)-mainnet.*")
)
